title: Varamos x Pomkots Mechs Survival
description: This Mod adds recipes and items to gain the ability to use Pomkots Mechs in Survival
body:
This is an add-on for the mods [Pomkots Mechs](https://modrinth.com/mod/pomkots-mechs) and [Pomkots Mechs Extension Pack](https://modrinth.com/mod/pomkots-mechs-extension-pack).  
It adds new crafting recipes and introduces a few additional items to expand your mech-building experience.

### The mod is in an alpha state

Created with: https://mcreator.net/
